[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0001000000 1
2 0001000000 1
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0001000000 1
7 1000011000 3

01 10 0001000000 1 match 1 2 6
12 21 1000101100 4
23 32 0000101000 2
34 43 0010100000 2
45 54 1000000000 1
56 65 0000000000 a match 0 3 4 5
67 76 0001000000 1 match 1 2 6
70 07 0001000000 1 match 1 2 6

02 20 0000000010 1
13 31 0000111000 3
24 42 1000100101 4
35 53 0000011000 2
46 64 0001000100 2
57 75 1000000000 1
60 06 0101000000 2
71 17 1001000000 2

03 30 0100000000 1
14 41 1001100100 4
25 52 1000001000 2
36 63 0100000000 1
47 74 1011000000 3
50 05 0000000000 a match 0 3 4 5
61 16 0001000100 2
72 27 1000000000 1

04 40 0001000000 1 match 1 2 6
15 51 1000011000 3 match 7
26 62 0000000100 1
37 73 0010000000 1
[completion]
